---
title: "CV"
page-layout: full
description: "Curriculum vitae of Mesfin Genie."
---

::: {.page-header}
::: {.page-shell .cv-header-grid}
::: {.cv-header-copy}
# Mesfin Genie

Senior Lecturer in Health Economics · Newcastle Business School · The University of Newcastle
:::

::: {.cv-header-actions}
[Download CV](mesfin-genie-cv.pdf){.button-primary target="_blank"}
[Print page]{.button-secondary data-print-page="true"}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.prose .cv-page}
## Academic appointments

::: {.timeline}
::: {.timeline-item}
### Senior Lecturer in Health Economics

**The University of Newcastle, Australia · 2026–present**  
Newcastle Business School.
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
### Lecturer in Health Economics

**The University of Newcastle, Australia · 2023–2025**  
Newcastle Business School.
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
### Health Measurement and Regulatory Science Fellow

**Duke University, United States · 2023–2024**  
Duke Department of Population Health Sciences; concurrent fellowship.
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
### Postdoctoral Research Fellow

**Auburn University, United States · 2022–2023**  
Harrison College of Pharmacy.
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
### Research Fellow

**University of Aberdeen, United Kingdom · 2020–2022**  
Health Economics Research Unit.
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
### Postdoctoral Research Fellow

**Ca’ Foscari University of Venice, Italy · 2019–2020**  
Department of Economics.
:::
:::

## Education

- **PhD in Economics**, Ca’ Foscari University of Venice, Italy, 2019
- **MSc in Health Economics and Management**, University of Bologna, Italy
- **MA in Economics**, Addis Ababa University, Ethiopia
- **BA in Economics**, Jimma University, Ethiopia

## Research fields

- Health economics and health preference research
- Choice modelling and discrete choice experiments
- Behavioural decision science and information processing
- Public health policy and programme evaluation

## Major grants and funded projects

- **MandEval: Effectiveness and consequences of Australia’s COVID-19 vaccine mandates**, Medical Research Future Fund, 2023–2026. University of Newcastle site lead.
- **Upscaling Field Epidemiology Training Programs in India**, World Bank, 2025. Lead.
- University of Newcastle research and conference schemes, 2024–2025.

## Teaching

- **ECON2112 · Health Economics and Finance**, course coordinator and lecturer
- **ECON3111 · Behavioural Economics**, course coordinator and lecturer
- **ECON3011 · Health Economics and Finance**, course coordinator and lecturer

## Professional service

Guest Editor for *Health Policy and Technology*. Reviewer for journals including *Journal of Health Economics*, *Health Economics*, *Social Science & Medicine*, *Value in Health*, *Journal of Choice Modelling*, *Theory and Decision* and *BMJ Open*.

## Profiles and contact

::: {.social-row}
<a class="social-link" href="mailto:mesfin.genie@newcastle.edu.au" title="Email" aria-label="Email"><i class="bi bi-envelope"></i></a>
<a class="social-link" href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=v2SXM_kAAAAJ&hl=en" title="Google Scholar" aria-label="Google Scholar"><i class="ai ai-google-scholar"></i></a>
<a class="social-link" href="https://orcid.org/0000-0002-1744-4666" title="ORCID" aria-label="ORCID"><i class="ai ai-orcid"></i></a>
<a class="social-link" href="https://au.linkedin.com/in/mesfin-genie-ph-d-65634216" title="LinkedIn" aria-label="LinkedIn"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>
<a class="social-link" href="https://github.com/DrGenie" title="GitHub" aria-label="GitHub"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>
<a class="social-link" href="https://www.newcastle.edu.au/profile/mesfin-genie" title="University profile" aria-label="University profile"><i class="bi bi-building"></i></a>
:::
:::
